violations.text: The dumpster outside is located on (dirt). The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The dumpster outside is located on (dirt). The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

Observed dead insects in corners of dry storage area. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Per interview of PIC mop wastewater is disposed of outside. Proper wastewater guidance was discussed. At least 1 service sink or 1 curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain shall be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Facility has two mop sinks/service sinks. One located directly outside of cafeteria and another on the other side of the facility. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. 54 Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
Observed mop drying in mop bucket both in kitchen and in custodian closet. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Proper air-drying methods discussed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
The gaskets of a large chest cooler were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
